summary: Multi-page professional website for coozy home Furniture - a modern furniture brand with elegant, minimal design and premium aesthetics
architectural_notes: Neutral color palette: beige, white, light brown, soft grey, black accents
Mobile-friendly responsive layout with generous white space
Modern fonts with consistent button styles throughout
High-quality lifestyle imagery for furniture products
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Hero banner background image showing modern furniture in elegant interior setting (hero-banner.dim_1920x800.png)
- Lifestyle image of a beige sofa in a minimalist living room (sofa-lifestyle.dim_800x600.png)
- Modern bed with neutral linens in bright bedroom setting (bed-lifestyle.dim_800x600.png)
- Elegant dining table with chairs in natural light (dining-table.dim_800x600.png)
- Contemporary office desk setup with ergonomic chair (office-desk.dim_800x600.png)
- Stylish coffee table in modern living space (coffee-table.dim_600x600.png)
- Minimalist TV unit in contemporary setting (tv-unit.dim_600x600.png)
- Wooden wardrobe in neutral bedroom interior (wardrobe.dim_600x600.png)
- Modern side table with lamp (side-table.dim_600x600.png)
- Ergonomic office chair in professional setting (office-chair.dim_600x600.png)
- Contemporary storage unit for office space (storage-unit.dim_600x600.png)
- About us brand story image showing craftsmanship detail (brand-story.dim_1200x600.png)
- Living room category banner with modern furniture (living-room-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Bedroom category banner with elegant bed setting (bedroom-banner.dim_1200x400.png)
- Office furniture category banner with workspace (office-banner.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a Home page with a large hero banner containing the headline 'Elevate Your Living Space.' and subtext about premium craftsmanship and modern design, featuring 'Shop Now' and 'Explore Collections' call-to-action buttons
Add a Featured Products section to the Home page displaying 4–6 furniture products with images, names, and prices in a grid layout
Create a Why Choose Us section on the Home page highlighting four key value propositions: Quality, Durability, Affordable Luxury, and Fast Delivery
Add a Testimonials section to the Home page displaying customer reviews and feedback
Create a Newsletter subscription section on the Home page with an email input field and subscribe button
Create a Shop page with a product grid layout and category filters for Living Room, Bedroom, Office, and Dining, displaying products with clean cards showing price and short description
Create a Living Room category page displaying sofas, coffee tables, and TV units with a modern layout and category banner
Create a Bedroom category page displaying beds, wardrobes, and side tables with a category-specific layout
Create an Office Furniture category page displaying desks, ergonomic chairs, and storage units
Create an About Us page with brand story content, mission and vision statements, and commitment to sustainability and quality
Create a Contact page with a contact form, phone number, email, store address, and embedded Google Maps section
Implement a navigation menu with a dropdown under 'Shop' that links to Living Room, Bedroom, and Office Furniture category pages
Apply an elegant, minimal, and premium design system with a neutral color palette using beige, white, light brown, soft grey, and black accents throughout all pages
Ensure the entire website is mobile-friendly with responsive layouts, adequate spacing for premium brand feel, and touch-optimized navigation

new_feature_requests.summary: Home page with hero banner, featured products, Why Choose Us, testimonials, and newsletter
Shop page with product grid and category filters
Living Room category page with sofas, coffee tables, TV units
Bedroom category page with beds, wardrobes, side tables
Office Furniture category page with desks, chairs, storage
About Us page with brand story, mission, vision, sustainability
Contact page with form, contact details, and Google Maps
Dropdown navigation menu with Shop subpages
